problem: Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear
hypothesis: Topological insulator surface state conduction may resolve Why do lithium batteries degrade at high temperature — ionic mechanism unclear by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Bench-top proof of concept with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
